About
ENSAM — Engineering & Systems

Hi, I'm
Simon Norture.

I'm pursuing an engineering degree at Arts et Métiers (ENSAM), one of France's top engineering schools, specializing in physical systems and industrial optimization. My ambition: bridge the gap between traditional industry and advanced operations research.

I believe in the power of the collective — whether it's optimizing a supply chain or leading a team. Combat sports and football strategy have taught me discipline, anticipation, and the weight of every decision.

Background

Experience
& education

Summer 202X

Engineering Intern

Thales Group

Deep dive into electromagnetism and network infrastructure within one of France's largest industrial groups. Applied theoretical physics to real-world defense and aerospace network challenges, operating under the most rigorous industrial standards.

2022 – 2024

CPGE TSI — Classe Préparatoire

Lycée Richelieu — Rueil-Malmaison

Two-year intensive preparatory program in Technology & Industrial Sciences. Achieved a 4/4 GPA — Major de promotion with top honours across all subjects in the second semester: 1st in Physics, 2nd in Mathematics, 2nd in SII, 2nd in French. First semester: 2nd in Physics, 2nd in SII.

Present

Engineering Student

Arts et Métiers (ENSAM)

Rigorous curriculum focused on mechanical, industrial and systems engineering. Building a solid foundation in physical constraints, manufacturing processes, and complex system modeling — with a strong lean toward operations research and optimization.

Projects

Academic &
technical work

05 projects
— 01

Academic Timetable Optimization

Complex scheduling algorithm developed at ENSAM to optimize university timetables. Strict constraints: no overlapping classes for professors, optimal room allocation and resource management throughout the institution.

Python Operations Research Scheduling Linear Programming
— 02

LIDAR Systems Analysis (TIPE)

Research project comparing LiDAR, sonar, and photogrammetry for autonomous vehicles. Built an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor on an Arduino with servo motor, modeled signals in MATLAB, and produced 3D environment mapping via Python — demonstrating sonar as the most cost-effective alternative.

Python MATLAB Arduino / C++ Signal Processing 3D Mapping
View Presentation
— 03

Gyroscopic Game Controller (TIPE)

Built a motion-based VR-style controller using a Wii Nunchuk (gyroscope + accelerometer) and Arduino, decoded via I2C bus analyzed on oscilloscope. Integrated a vibration motor for haptic feedback — all wired into a custom Pygame game reacting in real time to physical tilt.

Python / Pygame Arduino / C++ I2C / IMU Haptic Feedback
View Presentation
— 04

Foundry, Machining & Metrology

Full manufacturing lifecycle at ENSAM: foundry, precision machining, and metrological control of technical tolerances.

Manufacturing Quality Control
View Presentation
— 05

Autonomous Robot & Dijkstra

C++ robot with obstacle avoidance, enhanced by a from-scratch implementation of Dijkstra's algorithm for optimal pathfinding.

C++ Algorithms Robotics
Involvement

Leadership &
community

01

Mathematics Tutor

Personalized support for struggling students. I break down complex theorems into accessible concepts, rebuilding confidence and reigniting academic momentum.

02

Educational Content Creator

TikTok channel @scienceandia dedicated to democratizing mathematics — 12.3K followers. The mission: make math "cool" and accessible to everyone, proving that advanced concepts aren't reserved for an elite few.

03

Communications — Regatt'Arts

Communication strategy for the "Regatt'Arts" project. Leveraging social media skills to promote the event and drive large-scale community engagement.

Beyond Engineering

Interests &
passions

⚽

Football

5 years at Paris Academy — football taught me tactical thinking, collective intelligence, and how to perform under pressure. The same mindset I bring to every engineering challenge.

🥊

Boxing

Discipline, precision and controlled aggression. Boxing sharpens focus and builds the mental resilience needed to push through hard problems — in the ring or in the codebase.

∑

Mathematics — self-driven

I study mathematics outside of the curriculum, getting ahead of the syllabus by choice. Not because it's required — because I find it genuinely compelling. Analysis, algebra, topology.

⚛

Theoretical Physics

Deeply passionate about fluid mechanics and classical mechanics. The elegance of Navier-Stokes, Lagrangian formalism, and how mathematics describes the physical world at a fundamental level.

🎮

Games, Anime & Manga

Video games, anime and manga are more than entertainment — they are engines of creativity and ambition. They push you to envision worlds that don't exist yet, and to become better than you were.
